The cassette has recorded PUT requests that result in 400 errors. The cassette was recorded with these failures - the test was expected to handle the 400 error, but it doesn't.

Looking at line 6425: `method: PUT` with line 6430 showing the 400 error detail.

So the cassette itself contains the 400 error response. This means the test was run against a real server which returned a 400 error, and the cassette recorded it. When the test runs again with the cassette, it will replay the 400 error.
